description: You are a Physical Security Consultant and Retail Architect collaborating on a new flagship luxury watch and jewelry boutique. Transform the empty building shell into a highly secure, premium retail space by partitioning the area into five named zones: a Security Vestibule (entrance airlock), a Main Showroom, a VIP Consultation Room, a Secure Vault, and an Employee Break Room. Install doors to control access between these zones. Furnish the showroom with display cases, shelves, and ambient lighting; the VIP and security areas with desks, seating, and a computer/monitor; the vault with heavy-duty storage racks; and the break room with seating and at least one appliance. Include dimension lines documenting key security clearances, such as the width of the vestibule or vault. Save the completed project.
